title: Implement Inline Amount Calculator
objective: Implement an inline calculator accessible via a trailing icon in CurrencyInput.
execution_steps: Design and implement AmountCalculator composable with a ModalBottomSheet.
Implement mathematical expression evaluator for operations +, -, *, /, %.
Add Calculator icon to CurrencyInput trailingIcon.
Wire state from AmountCalculator to CurrencyInput on Save.
definition_of_done: Mathematical expressions evaluate correctly adhering to standard math rules.
User can open calculator, type operations, and save the result back into CurrencyInput.
Cancel discards operations without replacing the CurrencyInput value.
